ValidationRule.description: When Backoffice Approval Status = Approved and any of QB_Account_Name__c, Project_Template__c,Job__r.Job_Division__c, Shift__c, or Onboarding_Package__c is blank. Displays validation message
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: Text( Backoffice_Approval_Status__c ) = 'Approved' && (QB_Account_Name__c = Null ||Project_Template__c = Null || TEXT( Job__r.Job_Division__c ) = Null || Shift__c =Null || Onboarding_Package__c = Null)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: QB Account Name, Project Template, Shift, Division, Onboarding Package Fields are Required if Back Office Status = Approved
